text.title: Paid Ads Creative Library Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of Paid Ads Creative Library MUST enforce. Rationale + source per rule. Rules referenced by id from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Tag taxonomy MUST be fixed and documented (hook-type / offer / format / persona / funnel-stage). Free-form tags forbidden.
rule.rationale: Free-form tags decay into ungroupable chaos within a quarter; fixed taxonomy preserves searchability.

rule.statement: Every variant MUST record lineage_parent (previous asset_id) and what was changed. Lineage gaps invalidate iteration.
rule.rationale: Without lineage, the team cannot answer 'what test was won'; ROI of changes becomes unattributable.

rule.statement: Every asset MUST surface live performance (CTR, CVR, CPA) at the asset row. Stale performance > 7 days rejects the asset for new spend.
rule.rationale: Stale performance drives ad-fatigue spend; live performance is the kill / scale signal.

rule.statement: Tags MUST be applied at upload, not retroactively. Untagged assets are blocked from campaign upload.
rule.rationale: Retroactive tagging never happens; blocking at upload is the only enforcement that works.

rule.statement: Asset MUST be marked deprecated after 8 weeks live OR CTR drop > 30% from peak. Deprecated assets blocked from new campaigns.
rule.rationale: Creative fatigue is real and predictable; explicit deprecation prevents zombie spend.

rule.statement: If applicability preconditions are unmet (see AGENTS.md Skip If), the methodology MUST be skipped and a one-line skip-reason logged.
rule.rationale: A named skip terminal keeps decision-tree leaves resolvable and prevents silent misuse on misfit inputs.
